hero.subtitle: For businesses, sole traders and professionals. A design that builds trust, and optimization so people find you on Google and in AI search.

cards.title: They check you online
cards.text: An outdated or hard-to-find website costs you clients - people check businesses online today before they ever pick up the phone.

cards.title: Search is changing
cards.text: Customers look not only on Google, but increasingly through AI assistants like ChatGPT and Gemini. Most firms are not ready for that yet.

whatYouGet.title: What you get
whatYouGet.subtitle: No technical jargon - just results that help you win clients.

cards.title: A trustworthy design
cards.text: A modern, professional look that builds trust at first glance and sets you apart from the competition.

cards.title: Found on Google
cards.text: A website built for search engines, so potential clients find you exactly when they are looking.

cards.title: Ready for AI search
cards.text: Optimized for ChatGPT, Gemini and other AI assistants - where more and more people now make decisions.

cards.title: Works on mobile
cards.text: Fully functional and fast on phone, tablet and desktop. No compromises.

showcase.title: Examples of my work
showcase.subtitle: Websites that are already working for their owners.

projects.name: Lechman - law office
projects.description: A modern presentation website for a law office - a trustworthy design and optimization for Google and AI search.
projects.alt: Preview of lechman-advokat.sk - law office website

projects.name: BELLegis
projects.description: A presentation website for a real estate and business consultancy focused on clarity, trust and winning clients.
projects.alt: Preview of bellegis.sk - real estate and business consulting website

items.quote: Cooperation with Mr. Figula in the modification and development of the website for my law firm was carried out at an excellent level, and I am extremely satisfied with his work. I especially appreciate his proactive approach, prompt communication, and clear explanations regarding technical matters and concepts that an average user would not normally be familiar with. As a result, I perceive the website as modern, fast, and fully optimized for mobile devices. I would certainly recommend working with him to anyone looking for a reliable partner for website development.
items.author: JUDr. Vincent Lechman

process.title: How it works
process.subtitle: Simple, with no commitment at the start.

steps.title: Free review of your website
steps.text: I look at your current situation and tell you what can be improved - with no obligation, for free.

steps.title: Proposal and agreement
steps.text: We agree on the scope, look and price so the website makes sense for your business.

steps.title: Build and launch
steps.text: I build, refine and launch the website. You get to focus on your clients.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Write to me and we'll arrange a free review of your website. I usually reply within one business day.

meeting.heading: Schedule a meeting
meeting.description: Prefer a direct conversation? Book a 45-minute meeting and we'll go through your website in detail.

alerts.success: Thank you, your message has been sent. I'll get back to you soon.
alerts.error: The message could not be sent. Please try again or email me directly.
